data.name: My Pleasure - Season 3
data.detailed_description:
ATTENTION! You must have completed Seasons 1 and 2 to use your saves to play Season 3!


Welcome the 3rd Season of My Pleasure! It's time to reveal all the remaining secrets and mysteries!



Features:

  • High-quality graphics
  • Over 5.000 images
  • Over 500 animations!
  • 10-15 hours of game
  • An engaging mystery
  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls
  • 1 Holiday Special Event
  • Dozens of Extra Scenes
  • Scene gallery
  • Multiple playthroughs




    My Pleasure contains graphic sexual content, including:

    • Oral Sex
    • Anal Sex
    • Vaginal Sex
    • Masturbation
    • Voyeurism
    • Teasing
    • Cumshots
    • Facial
    • Public Sex
    • Netori
    • Exhibitionism
    • Creampies
    • Threesomes

    Player discretion is strongly advised.



    You can expect a 10- to 15-hour game that you can replay numerous times to experience different paths and girls.

    Note: To start and complete Season 3, you can choose one of the following methods:


    • 1. Play the standalone app Season 1 and its DLC - Season 2, make a save at the end of Season 2, start the standalone Season 3 and load that save;
    • 2. Launch the standalone Season 3 app. Select "Play Season 1 & 2" from the Main Menu, go through the content of these seasons and immediately start playing Season 3 (Note: in this case, the Season 1 & 2 content will be visually marked, as the standalone Season 3 app actually contains all of the Season 1 & 2 content).
    • 3. If none of the methods above work for you, you can launch the Season 3 standalone app and load one of the 2 save files in the "Load" menu. We've added these in case the player doesn't have saves made at the end of Season 2 and doesn't want to go through the game from the beginning.

    Warning! The game's save files are located in two places:


    • 1. In the game folder ("game\saves").
    • 2. In the "C:\Users\*username*\AppData\Roaming\RenPy\MyPleasure-S" folder common to Seasons 1, 2 and 3. This means that if you start Season 3, you can load the saves you made in Seasons 1 and 2, because the game will detect the files in the "AppData\Roaming\RenPy\MyPleasure-S" folder. But if you make saves in Season 3 and try to load them by running the standalone Season 1 app (and its Season 2 DLC), the game will crash because Season 1 can't find the Season 3 content.

    We've added the Season name to the name of the saves. Do not attempt to load saves from the Season 3 standalone app while playing the Season 1 standalone app.

data.short_description: Welcome to the third and final season of My Pleasure, a choice-driven adult Visual Novel, full of hot women, mystery, and sex! This VN is packed with high-quality graphics, a rich story, humor, and hot close-up animations!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
